title: Design & Code: Secure By Design

location.name: Crews Center for Entrepreneurship, 2nd Floor - University of Memphis

summary: Come hang out at the Crews Center for a conversation on cybersecurity with Mac, a DevSecOps specialist and software developer. He'll be breaking down how to implement 'Secure by Design' principles into your workflow. Whether you're a founder or a dev, you'll walk away with a better understanding of how to keep your sites from becoming easy targets for hackers. This is a vital conversation for any devs, designers, or founders looking to ship legitimate products out into the world.

description.whoIsThisFor: UI/UX designers, software engineers, or aspiring developers who want to level up their web game and understand performance-focused development.

agenda.details: Grab some food and meet new faces.

Breaking down how to implement 'Secure by Design' principles into your workflow. Whether you're a founder or a dev, you'll walk away with a better understanding of how to keep your sites from becoming easy targets for hackers.
A space to share projects, ask follow-up questions, and connect with the community.

rsvp.details: Please confirm your attendance via this Meetup page so we can get an accurate headcount for food.
